findings.message: rename_item endpoint violates derived-field consistency contract. The function directly modifies item.name without recalculating item.slug, causing slug to become stale. The repository has update_item_name() (which correctly keeps slug in sync), but the endpoint bypasses it. This creates a direct path to storing inconsistent derived data.
findings.suggestion: Import update_item_name from ..db.repository and call it instead of directly mutating item.name. Replace lines 45-51 with: item = update_item_name(session, item_id, payload.name) if item else None; then handle the None case.
